# SnoEntry constructor

One resolved `CoreTOC.dat` entry: a SNO record's group, numeric id, and name.

```csharp
public SnoEntry(SnoGroup Group, int Id, string Name)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| Group | SNO group. |
| Id | SNO numeric id (unique within a group). |
| Name | SNO name, e.g. `Paragon_Warlock_00`. |
